scripts.dev: npm run dev -w @qhse/backend & npm run dev -w @qhse/frontend
scripts.build: npm run build -w @qhse/shared && npm run build -w @qhse/backend && npm run build -w @qhse/frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @qhse/shared && npm run typecheck -w @qhse/backend && npm run typecheck -w @qhse/frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @qhse/backend && npm run lint -w @qhse/frontend
scripts.test: echo "No automated tests yet. See package-level README files."
